overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traveling along a dirt path through the Toussaint countryside during golden hour. The character passes by a stone wall and NPC villagers while a distant castle and mountains remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside trail with distant castle view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant castle

entered.detail: large stone castle with multiple towers visible on the horizon
hazy mountains forming the backdrop behind the castle
winding dirt trail with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass
clusters of deciduous trees dotting the rolling hills
red and purple wildflowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open dirt trail through lush countryside. Wildflowers line the path while a grand castle and mountain range dominate the distant horizon under a golden sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: country path with stone wall boundary

events.description: low stone wall appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path beside a mossy stone wall

entered.detail: weathered stone wall covered in moss running parallel to the path
stone houses with red tiled roofs visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path continues alongside a moss-covered stone wall on the right. Village buildings become visible on the left while the distant castle remains in view ahead.

events.description: Geralt transitions from walking to running
NPC villagers pass close by on the left side

agents.ego_description: running past villagers walking in the opposite direction along the path

notable_agents.action: villager in green dress with red hair walking toward the camera
villager wearing a hat walking along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt breaks into a run, passing by villagers walking along the path. The stone wall continues on the right as the path winds through the rural landscape with village buildings drawing closer on the left.

events.description: path curves away from castle direction into open meadow with tall grass

agents.ego_description: running along the curving path through tall grass and wildflowers

entered.detail: dense field of white wildflowers covering the meadow

segments.scene_description: The stone wall ends as the path curves through an open meadow filled with tall grass and white wildflowers. The distant castle and village buildings disappear from view, replaced by expansive mountain vistas and open countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that transitions from a structured village outskirts into an expansive, open wilderness. It begins with Geralt walking through a lush countryside lined with wildflowers, with a grand castle and mountain range dominating the golden sunset horizon. As the path continues, the scene shifts to include a moss-covered stone wall on the right and village buildings appearing on the left. The camera then accelerates as Geralt breaks into a run, passing by local villagers while the path winds closer to the rural settlement. Finally, the stone wall ends and the path curves into an open meadow of tall grass and white wildflowers, leaving the village and castle behind to reveal wide mountain vistas and an open landscape.
